title: iria muelleriana
intro: Iria muelleriana, also known as Iriomote mint, is a species of plant in the Lamiaceae family, native to the Iriomote Island in Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Iria muelleriana include reducing stress, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of colds and fever. Iria muelleriana is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to make a variety of herbal preparations, such as salves, creams, and ointments.
